description: TrustShield labeled demo set — securities-market context. label: 'malicious' (should flag MEDIUM/HIGH) or 'legit' (should be LOW). Text-based channels; audio handled by make_demo_audio.py.

items.label: malicious
items.text:
Subject: URGENT: Your SEBI investor account will be suspended

Dear Investor, SEBI has detected irregular trading in your demat account. To avoid immediate suspension, re-verify your KYC and OTP within 24 hours at http://sebi-kyc-verify.xyz/login . Failure to act will freeze your holdings.

- SEBI Compliance Team

items.label: malicious
items.text:
Subject: NSE Pre-IPO Allotment Confirmed

Congratulations! You are allotted pre-IPO shares with guaranteed 300% returns. Pay a refundable processing fee via UPI and confirm at http://nse-preipo-allotment.top/claim within 2 hours. Limited slots.

items.label: malicious
items.text:
Subject: Zerodha account blocked

Your Kite account is temporarily blocked due to failed KYC. Update your PAN and password immediately here: http://kite-zerodha-secure.click/reactivate to restore access.

items.label: malicious
items.text: Dear customer, your mutual fund redemption of Rs 4,50,000 is pending. Confirm bank details and share the OTP sent to your phone to release funds: https://amfi-refund-portal.online/verify

items.label: legit
items.text:
Subject: Your monthly account statement

Hi, your account statement for June is now available. Log in to your dashboard at https://zerodha.com to download it. We never ask for your OTP or password over email.

items.label: legit
items.text:
Subject: Contract note for trades dated 30 June

Please find attached your contract note. For any queries, contact support through the official app. Regards, Broking Operations, https://groww.in

items.label: malicious
items.text: RBI NOTICE: Your investment account is flagged under new regulations. To claim your protected funds and avoid legal action, verify identity at http://rbi-secure-refund.link/kyc and pay the Rs 999 verification charge today only.

items.label: legit
items.text:
Subject: Webinar invite — Understanding index funds

Join our free educational webinar this Saturday. No payment required. Register on our official site https://amfiindia.com/investor-corner . This email is informational only.

items.label: malicious
items.text: 🚀🚀 URGENT BUY CALL 🚀🚀 Insider tip: XYZ Ltd doubling next week! SEBI-registered advisor. Guaranteed 200% returns. Join our VIP Telegram now before it's too late: https://t.me/stockmultibagger999

items.label: malicious
items.text: Official SEBI advisory channel. We share sure-shot intraday tips with 95% accuracy. Pay Rs 4999 to unlock premium calls today only. DM or click https://sure-shot-tips.top/join

items.label: malicious
items.text: Pre-IPO shares of a hot company available at discount! Limited seats. Risk-free multibagger. Transfer via UPI and join https://wa.me/preipo-deals to book your allotment now.

items.label: malicious
items.text: BREAKING: RBI approves this crypto-stock scheme. Double your money in 30 days, guaranteed. Government approved. Click to invest: https://rbi-approved-scheme.buzz

items.label: legit
items.text: Reminder from our official handle: SEBI never guarantees returns and registered advisors never demand fees for 'sure-shot' tips. Learn more at https://www.sebi.gov.in . Stay safe.

items.label: legit
items.text: Markets closed higher today led by IT stocks. This is general commentary and not investment advice. Do your own research. https://www.nseindia.com

items.label: legit
items.text:
Subject: SEBI Investor Charter update

The updated Investor Charter is published on our website. Read it at https://www.sebi.gov.in/investor-charter.html . SEBI communicates only through official channels and never asks for OTP or payment. dkim=pass spf=pass

items.label: legit
items.text:
Subject: Trading holiday notice

The exchange will remain closed on the declared holiday. Details on https://www.nseindia.com/resources/exchange-communication-holidays . Informational notice only.

Your monthly CAS is available. Access it via https://www.cdslindia.com . We will never ask you to share your password or OTP. dkim=pass

items.label: malicious
items.text: Dear investor, please complete verification to continue trading. Access your account portal here: http://secure-verification-portal.xyz/auth

items.label: malicious
items.text: This smallcap is about to fly 🚀 I'm loading up before the news drops next week. Not financial advice 😉 more in my channel https://t.me/tipschannel

items.label: legit
items.text: PSA: nobody can promise 'guaranteed returns' in the market. If someone asks you to pay for sure-shot tips, it's a scam. Report it. This is educational, not advice.

items.label: malicious
items.text: Hi, we noticed a login from a new device. If this wasn't you, secure your account now: http://account-reactivate-portal.top/relogin
